content.en:
Soon.

The elders of the Blood People Tribe sent batches of Eightfold Primordial Ancestors, enough to send tens of thousands of Eightfold Primordial Ancestors.

None of these eightfold original sins have any potential to be promoted to the avatar level, but they are also the backbone of the Blood Tribe.

But for the sake of this secret place, the loss of these eightfold ancestral bloodmen will also be lost, and they can still make up for it in the future.

Buzz Buzz!!

A bloody person named Eightfold Origin Ancestor level was erased by several Transformation-level elders who belonged to the Eightfold Origin Ancestor, forcibly destroying the cultivation, leaving only the strength of the Eightfold Origin Ancestor with only half a step.

In this way, these Eightfold Origin Ancestors will never have a chance to become Eightfold Origin Ancestor level blood people, and it can be said that they are completely abolished!

"Let's go inside!"

Several Avatar-level elders sent all of the Eightfold Ancestral Blood Men who had reduced their cultivation to the secret land, and Killua also re-entered the secret place after recovering from his injuries.

In the following days, the half-step Eightfold Origin Ancestors of the major forces were miserable, and they were attacked by those Eightfold Origin Ancestors who had lowered their cultivation.

In a short period of time, more than ten half-step eightfold ancestors fell, and the losses were extremely huge!

Of course, those who were bloody lost more.

However, those blood people themselves are easy to cultivate and have little value.

Relatively speaking, the losses of the major forces are serious, which is equivalent to exchanging a genius for the lives of a bunch of high-level cannon fodder!

No matter how many geniuses there are in the major forces, it is impossible to change them like this!

......

"The Blood Man Tribe sent in a bunch of Eightfold Origin Ancestor Blood People who have lowered their cultivation?"

Ye Tian also got the news at this time, and was immediately a little shocked.

Any Eightfold Origin Ancestor is also an intermediate force in the regional boundary, and even the leaders and elders of some forces, even in the Nine-Fold Building, the Eightfold Origin Ancestor has a high status, and it is impossible to sacrifice at will.

But the Blood Man Tribe sacrificed so many Eightfold Ancestors at once.

And the forces such as the Nine-Fold Building can't sacrifice the Eightfold Origin Ancestor like this, and those Eightfold Origin Ancestors won't agree, and only the Primordial Antiquities can do such a thing.

In the face of the methods of the Blood Tribe, the major forces are also thinking about countermeasures.

At this time, Ye Tian finally excavated the entire space-time purple lazuli vein, and obtained a total of billions of space-time purple lazuli.

So many space-time purple lazuli stones can be said to be unimaginable wealth, and for the Nine Ancestors of the Ninefold, they are all a good fortune!

"With so many space-time purple lazuli stones, I can create the top-notch Ninefold Yuan Dao embryo for myself!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Subsequently, he left the area, leaving behind only a broken vein.

......

Another period of time has passed.

this day.

The Nine-Story Building summoned all the half-step Eightfold Ancestors to evacuate from the secret place.

After Ye Tian received the news, he left the secret place as soon as possible.

After coming back, I realized that the Nine-Story Building did not give up the secret place, but that it was not worth it to continue to consume with the Blood People Tribe like this.

After all, no matter how much the Blood Man Tribe's primordial artifacts consumed, they wouldn't feel distressed, but the Nine-Story Building wouldn't joke with the lives of those half-step eight-fold ancestors.

This time, these half-step Yae Ancestors were called back, just for the next general attack.

"Holy Killing Dao Array!"

Ye Tian learned from the mouth of the Absolute Sword Dao Ancestor that the joint deduction of those top Nine Ancestors of the Nine-Fold Building had created this extremely terrifying Killing Array.

It takes 10,800 half-step eightfold ancestors to unite to form a true Holy Killing Dao Array.

At present, the Nine-Fold Building can barely gather so many half-step eight-fold ancestors, but this killing army array is too mysterious and complicated.

Therefore, these half-step eightfold ancestors needed to comprehend the true mystery of the Holy Killing Dao, and then enter that secret place together after comprehending it thoroughly, and kill all those primordial antiquities.

Moreover, they are convinced that the Bloodman tribe has no way to cope.

"Yes, the Blood Man Tribe is just a half-step eightfold blood man with wisdom, the other blood people have no wisdom, even if the Transformation Level powerhouses of the Blood Man Tribe have also deduced such a killing array, but they can't cooperate with it!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Subsequently, he also went to participate in the Holy Killing Dao Array.

At the same time, he also exchanged the Space-Time Purple Lazuli he had obtained for the Nine-Story Building, and then exchanged it for other materials of the same level.

There are many materials in the Nine-Story Building that are suitable for refining the Nine-Fold Yuan Dao embryo, but the requirements for exchanging them are very high, either you need to do some special tasks, or you need materials of the same level to exchange them.

And the space-time purple lazuli meets the requirements.

As a result, Ye Tian exchanged all kinds of extremely precious materials in a short period of time.

Not long after, Ye Tian finally gathered the materials.

"With so many precious materials, the Ninefold Yuan Dao embryo created is definitely the top one!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

However, he didn't go to refining it now, he waited until he reached the limit of the half-step Eightfold Origin Ancestor and the life level was very slow, and then he went to refine the Ninefold Yuan Dao Embryo and refine it into his body.

......

Secret place.

More than 10,000 half-step eightfold ancestors of the nine-story building gathered here, and some of the half-step eightfold ancestors did not get the quota, but at this moment, they were all sent in order to make up the number.

At this time, they all had comprehended the Holy Killing Dao Array, and they were all integrated into the Holy Killing Dao Array Seal, which could be combined into an array at any time.

"Let's go inside!"

One by one, the Ninefold Ancestors tore through the barrier of the secret land, forming a passage for this group of half-step Eightfold Ancestors to enter.

And Ye Tian and the other half-step eightfold ancestors entered, and immediately formed a holy killing dao array.

Airplanes!!!!

More than 10,000 half-step eightfold ancestors seemed to be connected together under the shuttle of light, and an extremely terrifying body appeared, and the terrifying aura did not know how many times more than the half-step eightfold ancestor.

However, the level of this power still belongs to the half-step Eightfold Primordial Ancestor, and it has not reached the Eightfold Primordial Ancestor realm in terms of quality, but the quantity is too terrifying!

"Kill!"

The body of the Dao Formation formed by the Holy Killing Dao Array held a killing blade in its hand, and it tore away with a single sword, killing countless primordial artifacts in this area.

Then, the body continued to shuttle through the secret land, slaughtering the primordial artifacts in a frenzy.

......

"What's going on?"

Killua was shocked.

These half-step eightfold ancestor cultivators had obviously left, and he thought that those cultivators had given up.

As a result, these cultivators returned, and looking through the blood mirror, these cultivators actually combined into such a terrifying military formation.

Abrupt.

A terrifying figure appeared in his perception.

"Not good!"

He knew he was locked in.

However, all his struggles were useless!

A blow that was enough to kill the top Yae Ancestor struck mightily, directly shattering his body.

And just like that, Killua was killed.

And those blood people who had been lowered by the Eightfold Ancestral Blood People to come in were also killed in large numbers, and in a short period of time, the Primordial Antiquities in the Secret Land were almost emptied by the Holy Killing Dao Array of the Nine Towers and the Ten Dao Mountains.
